title: Definition: Triple Split
description: You have three separate energy circuits. No single person bridges them all — you need a diverse social environment to feel fully expressed. Diversity in relationships is not distraction, it is design.
learningGoal: The viewer understands, in plain daily-life terms, what "triple split" means for them and feels recognised, not labelled.
keyPoints: You have three separate energy circuits.
No single person bridges them all
you need a diverse social environment to feel fully expressed.
Diversity in relationships is not distraction, it is design.
forbiddenClaims: one definition is more whole or complete than another
split definitions mean you are broken or need fixing
you depend on a partner to be complete

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: Definition: Triple Split — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: Definition: Triple Split — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.hook: Definition: Triple Split — try this today.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: Definition: Triple Split — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: Definition: Triple Split — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: You have three separate energy circuits. No single person bridges them all — you need a diverse social environment to feel fully expressed. Diversity in relationships is not distraction, it is design.
